steps.title: Identify the decisive contrast
steps.content: The word “However” signals a pivot from the previous sentence's focus on cultural icons to a different category: ordinary people. The underlined sentence then anchors this shift with a specific example—the young girl on a sidewalk.

steps.title: Match the function to the answer
steps.content:
D identifies the function precisely: it provides a concrete example of an everyday individual. A contradicts the shift, while B and C miss what the sentence actually accomplishes.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
